520.18(1): shi la tshul khrims bsrung ba la 'chal ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar 
520.19(1): che'o/ /rga shi'i tshul khrims bsrung ba la 'chal ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo 
520.20(1): mtshar che'o/ /
520.21(1): de ltar na/ sbyin pa'i bla na med par phyin pa nyid tshul khrims bsrung ba la/ 'chal 
521.1(1): ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /de bzhin du/ tshul khrims kyi bla 
521.2(1): na med par phyin pa dang / bzod pa'i bla na med par phyin pa dang / brtson 'grus kyi 
521.3(1): bla na med par phyin pa dang / bsam gtan gyi bla na med par phyin pa dang / stobs 
521.4(1): kyi bla na med par phyin pa dang / snying rje'i bla na med par phyin pa dang / smon lam gyi 
521.5(1): bla na med par phyin pa dang / thabs kyi bla na med par phyin pa dang / shes rab kyi bla 
521.6(1): na med par phyin pa tshul khrims bsrung pa la/ 'chal ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni 
521.7(1): e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /phyi stong pa nyid dang / nang stong pa nyid dang / phyi nang stong pa 
521.8(1): nyid dang / 'dus byas stong pa nyid dang / 'dus ma byas stong pa nyid dang / mtha' 
521.9(1): las 'das pa stong pa nyid dang / mi dmigs pa stong pa nyid dang / chen po stong 
521.10(1): pa nyid dang / don dam pa stong pa nyid dang / rang bzhin stong pa nyid dang / rang 
521.11(1): bzhin med pa stong pa nyid dang / rang gi mtshan nyid stong pa nyid dang / thog ma 
521.12(1): dang tha ma med pa stong pa nyid dang / dor ba med pa stong pa nyid dang / dngos po 
521.13(1): med pa stong pa nyid dang / dngos po med pa'i ngo bo nyid stong pa nyid dang / bon 
521.14(1): thams cad stong pa nyid dang / stong pa nyid stong pa nyid du tshul khrims bsrung ba la 
521.15(1): 'chal ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /dran pa nye bar bzhag 
521.16(1): pa bzhi dang / yang dag par spong ba bzhi dang / rdzu 'phrul gyi rkang pa bzhi dang /
521.17(1): dbang po rnams dang / ting nge 'dzin rnams dang / gshen rab kyi lam bzhi dang /
521.18(1): mi 'jigs pa'i stobs rnams dang / thar pa'i lam brgyad dang / phyir mi ldog pa'i 
521.19(1): 'bras bu dang / lan gcig phyir 'ong ba'i 'bras bu dang / rgyun du zhugs pa'i 
521.20(1): 'bras bu dang / tshad med pa bzhi'i tshul khrims bsrung ba la 'chal ba med pa'i skyes 
521.21(1): bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /g.yung drung gi bon phye ba med pa las ma 'dres 
522.1(1): pa dgu dang / yang dag pa'i rig pa nyid dang / g.yung drung gi yan lag dgu dang /
522.2(1): gshen rab kyi bden pa bzhi dang / so so yang dag par rig pa bzhi dang / mi 
522.3(1): bsnyel ba'i gzungs dang / mthar gyis gnas pa'i snyoms par 'jug pa dgu dang /
522.4(1): mtshan ma med pa la snyoms par 'jug pa bzhi dang / rgyun du gnas pa'i thugs rje 
522.5(1): bzhi'i tshul khrims bsrung ba la 'chal ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar 
522.6(1): che'o/ /rtogs pa chen po'i lta ba dang / bsrung du med pa'i dam tshig dang / lhun gyis 
522.7(1): grub pa'i phrin las dang / rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa dang / legs par 'byung ba'i 
522.8(1): yon tan dang / snyoms par gnas pa'i ngang nyid dang / 'gyur ba med pa'i sku dang /
522.9(1): rang bzhin med pa'i gsung dang / mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i thugs dang /
522.10(1): rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes dang / bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 
522.11(1): 'bras bu nyid du tshul khrims bsrung ba la 'chal ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma 
522.12(1): ngo mtshar che'o/ /ma 'dres pa'i yan lag phyag rgya/
522.13(1): yid kyi khye'u chung gis gsol pa gshen rab lags/ bzod pa bsgom pa la ngo 
522.14(1): mtshar che ba'i tshig ci la gdags pa lags/ gang zhig bzod pa bsgom pa'i skyes bu 
522.15(1): rnams ni ngo mtshar che'o/ /ngo mtshar che ba'i rgyu zhig mnga' 'am mnga' bar 'gyur 
522.16(1): ram/ gshen rab mi bos bka' stsal pa/ yid kyi khye'u chung / gang zhig bla na med pa 
522.17(1): yang dag par rdzogs pa'i gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen 
522.18(1): po bzod pa bsgom pa la byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /
522.19(1): gang zhig gzhan gyi rnam par 'tshe ba la bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes 
522.20(1): bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig bdud kyi dpung 'gran 'dzugs pa de 
522.21(1): la bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /
523.1(1): gang zhig gdon gyi tshogs nyams sod pa de la bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med 
523.2(1): pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig mi dang mi ma yin gyis ngag 
523.3(1): 'chal pa dang tshig rtsub mo smra ba de la bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes 
523.4(1): bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/'o/ /gang zhig 'khor ba dang mya ngan gdung ba lta bu'i 
523.5(1): de la bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /
523.6(1): gang zhig las kyi rkyen don lta bu de la bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes 
523.7(1): bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig rmi lam gyi g.yang sa dang bag chags rgyu 
523.8(1): ba de la/ bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar 
523.9(1): che'o/ /gang zhig 'byung ba chen po lnga'i nus mthu'i reg pa lta bu de la/ bzod pa 
523.10(1): bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig 
523.11(1): bkres skom gyis gdung ba rnams la sha khrag la zas 'tshol ba lta bu de la bzod pa 
523.12(1): bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /
523.13(1): de ltar na/ gzugs la mi bde bas reg cing bskyed pa de la/ bzod pa bsgom 
523.14(1): zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /de bzhin du/ tshor 
523.15(1): ba dang / 'du shes dang / 'du byed dang / rnam par shes pa la mi bde bas reg 
523.16(1): cing bskyed pa de la/ bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma 
523.17(1): ngo mtshar che'o/ /mig dang gzugs dang / rna ba dang sgra dang / sna dang dri dang / lce 
523.18(1): dang ro dang / lus dang reg dang / yid dang bon la mi bde bas reg cing bskyed 
523.19(1): pa la/ bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar 
523.20(1): che'o/ /mig gi rnam par shes pa dang / rna ba'i rnam par shes pa dang / sna yi rnam 
523.21(1): par shes pa dang / lce yi rnam par shes pa dang / lus kyi rnam par shes pa dang /
524.1(1): yid kyi rnam par shes pa la mi bde bas reg cing bskyed pa de la/ bzod pa bsgom 
524.2(1): zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /mig gi 'dus te 
524.3(1): reg par shes pa'i rkyen gyis tshor ba dang / rna ba'i 'dus te reg par shes pa'i rkyen 
524.4(1): gyis tshor ba dang / sna yi 'dus te reg par shes pa'i rkyen gyis tshor ba dang / lce yi 
524.5(1): 'dus te reg par shes pa'i rkyen gyis tshor ba dang / lus kyi 'dus te reg par shes 
524.6(1): pa'i rkyen gyis tshor ba dang / yid kyi 'dus te reg par shes pa'i rkyen gyis tshor ba 
524.7(1): la mi bde bas reg cing bskyed pa de la/ bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i 
524.8(1): skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /rlung gi khams dang / me yi khams dang / chu 
524.9(1): yi khams dang / sa yi khams dang / nam mkha'i khams dang / rnam par shes pa'i 
524.10(1): khams la mi bde bas reg cing bskyed pa de la/ bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med 
524.11(1): pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /ma rig pa dang / 'du byed dang / rnam

524.18(1): phyin pa dang / bzod pa'i bla na med par phyin pa dang / brtson 'grus kyi bla na med

525.18(1): dgu dang / gshen rab kyi bden pa bzhi dang / so so yang dag par rig pa bzhi 
525.19(1): dang / mi bsnyel ba'i gzungs dang / mthar gyis gnas pa'i snyoms par 'jug pa 
525.20(1): dgu dang / mtshan ma med pa la snyoms par 'jug pa bzhi dang / rgyun du gnas 
525.21(1): pa'i thugs rje bzhi nyid du bzod pa bsgom zhing byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni

526.2(1): dang / lhun gyis grub pa'i phrin las dang / rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa dang / legs

526.5(1): pa'i thugs dang / rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes dang / bla na med pa yang

526.7(1): bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /ma 'dres pa'i yan lag phyag rgya/

526.9(1): mtshar che ba'i tshig ci la gdags/ gang zhig bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 
526.10(1): gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po rnams la ngo mtshar che 
526.11(1): ba'i rgyu zhig mnga' 'am mnga' bar 'gyur ram/ gshen rab mi bos bka' stsal pa/
526.12(1): yid kyi khye'u chung de ni 'di lta ste/ gang zhig bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i

526.14(1): btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig bon nyid 
526.15(1): gang ga'i klung du thog med ye shes kyi rig pa rtsal sbyangs zhing / brtson 'grus bskyed 
526.16(1): pa la btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig thang 
526.17(1): cig tsam du mnos pa'i dge ba'i rtsa ba ci bgyis pa gang lags pa la/ brtson 'grus 
526.18(1): bskyed cing btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig 
526.19(1): phyogs bcu'i gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po rnams kyi 
526.20(1): lung bstan pa'i don la/ brtson 'grus bskyed cing btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu

527.3(1): dgongs nas/ brtson 'grus bskyed cing btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni

528.18(1): stobs kyi bla na med par phyin pa dang / snying rje'i bla na med par phyin pa dang / smon

528.20(1): rab kyi bla na med par phyin pa la brtson 'grus bskyed cing btang snyoms med pa'i 
528.21(1): skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /phyi stong pa nyid dang / nang stong pa nyid 
529.1(1): dang / phyi nang stong pa nyid dang / 'dus byas stong pa nyid dang / 'dus ma byas 
529.2(1): stong pa nyid dang / mtha' las 'das pa stong pa nyid dang / mi dmigs pa stong pa

529.4(1): stong pa nyid dang / rang bzhin med pa stong pa nyid dang / rang gi mtshan nyid stong 
529.5(1): pa nyid dang / thog ma dang tha ma med pa stong pa nyid dang / dor ba med pa stong 
529.6(1): pa nyid dang / dngos po med pa stong pa nyid dang / dngos po med pa'i ngo bo nyid 
529.7(1): stong pa nyid dang / bon thams cad stong pa nyid dang / stong pa nyid stong pa nyid kyi 
529.8(1): brtson 'grus bskyed cing btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar 
529.9(1): che'o/ /dran pa nye bar bzhag pa bzhi dang / yang dag par spong ba bzhi dang / rdzu 
529.10(1): 'phrul gyi rkang pa bzhi dang / dbang po rnams dang / ting nge 'dzin rnams dang /
529.11(1): gshen rab kyi lam bzhi dang / mi 'jigs pa'i stobs rnams dang / thar pa'i lam 
529.12(1): brgyad dang / phyir mi ldog pa'i 'bras bu dang / lan gcig phyir 'ong ba'i 'bras bu 
529.13(1): dang / rgyun du zhugs pa'i 'bras bu dang / tshad med pa bzhi'i don la brtson 'grus 
529.14(1): bskyed cing btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /g.yung 
529.15(1): drung gi bon phye ba med pa las ma 'dres pa dgu dang / yang dag pa'i rig pa nyid 
529.16(1): dang / g.yung drung gi yan lag dgu dang / gshen rab kyi bden pa bzhi dang / so 
529.17(1): so yang dag par rig pa bzhi dang / mi bsnyel ba'i gzungs dang / mthar gyis 
529.18(1): gnas pa'i snyoms par 'jug pa dgu dang / mtshan ma med pa la snyoms par 'jug 
529.19(1): pa bzhi dang / rgyun du gnas pa'i thugs rje bzhi'i don la brtson 'grus bskyed cing 
529.20(1): btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /rtogs pa chen po'i 
529.21(1): lta ba dang / bsrung du med pa'i dam tshig dang / lhun gyis grub pa'i phrin las dang /
530.1(1): rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa dang / legs par 'byung ba'i yon tan dang / snyoms 
530.2(1): par gnas pa'i ngang nyid dang / 'gyur ba med pa'i sku dang / rang bzhin med 
530.3(1): pa'i gsung dang / mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i thugs dang / rnam pa thams cad 
530.4(1): mkhyen pa'i ye shes dang / bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 'bras bu'i don 
530.5(1): la brtson 'grus bskyed cing btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar 
530.6(1): che'o/ /ma 'dres pa'i yan lag phyag rgya/ 
530.7(1): yid kyi khye'u chung gis gsol pa gshen rab lags/ bsam gtan la gnas 
530.8(1): la ngo mtshar che ba'i tshig ci la gdags/ gang zhig gshen rab g.yung drung sems 
530.9(1): dpa' sems dpa' rnams/ bsam gtan la gnas pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo 
530.10(1): mtshar che ba'i rgyu zhig mnga' 'am mnga' bar 'gyur ram/ gshen rab mi bos bka' 
530.11(1): stsal pa/ yid kyi khye'u chung gang zhig bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i gshen 
530.12(1): rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po rnams bsam gtan la g.yo 
530.13(1): rtsol med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig bsam gtan la 
530.14(1): gnas pa la/ g.yos pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig 
530.15(1): bsam gtan mi 'khrug pa chen po de la/ g.yos pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma 
530.16(1): ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig bsam gtan dag la gnas pa de la/ g.yos pa med pa'i 
530.17(1): skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig bsam gtan rgya che la dmigs pa 
530.18(1): med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig bla na med pa yang dag 
530.19(1): par rdzogs pa'i gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' rnams ni e ma 
530.20(1): ngo mtshar che'o/ /lung bstan pa'i bsam gtan la gnas pa de la g.yos pa med pa'i 
530.21(1): sres ba rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /
531.1(1): de ltar na/ gang zhig gzugs mi dmigs pa'i bsam gtan la gnas pa de

531.5(1): mig dang gzugs dang / rna ba dang sgra dang / sna dang dri dang / lce dang ro dang /
531.6(1): lus dang reg dang / yid dang bon mi dmigs pa'i bsam gtan la gnas pa

532.5(1): la gnas pa de la/ g.yos pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /de

532.17(1): ma med pa stong pa nyid dang / dor ba med pa stong pa nyid dang / dngos po med pa

540.21(1): byams pa'i snying rje bskyed pa la/ bdag phyogs med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo

548.18(1): rab gsal ba la/ 'khrul pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /mig

548.20(1): shes pa'i rkyen gyis tshor ba dang / sna yi 'dus te reg par shes pa'i rkyen gyis tshor ba 
548.21(1): dang / lce yi 'dus te reg par shes pa'i rkyen gyis tshor ba dang / lus kyi 'dus te

549.16(1): pa dang / shes rab kyi bla na med par phyin pa la mkhas pa'i shes rab gsal bar 
549.17(1): gyur pa la/ 'khrul pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /phyi stong pa 
549.18(1): nyid dang / nang stong pa nyid dang / phyi nang stong pa nyid dang / 'dus byas stong

549.20(1): dang / mi dmigs pa stong pa nyid dang / chen po stong pa nyid dang / don dam 
549.21(1): pa stong pa nyid dang / rang bzhin stong pa nyid dang / rang bzhin med pa stong pa 
550.1(1): nyid dang / rang gi mtshan nyid stong pa nyid dang / thog ma dang tha ma med pa stong 
550.2(1): pa nyid dang / dor ba med pa stong pa nyid dang / dngos po med pa stong pa nyid 
550.3(1): dang / dngos po med pa'i ngo bo nyid stong pa nyid dang / bon thams cad stong pa 
550.4(1): nyid dang / stong pa nyid stong pa nyid la mkhas pa'i shes rab gsal bar gyur pa 
550.5(1): la/ 'khrul pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /dran pa nye bar 
550.6(1): bzhag pa bzhi dang / yang dag par spong ba bzhi dang / rdzu 'phrul gyi rkang pa bzhi 
550.7(1): dang / dbang po rnams dang / ting nge 'dzin rnams dang / gshen rab kyi lam 
550.8(1): bzhi dang / mi 'jigs pa'i stobs rnams dang / thar pa'i lam brgyad dang / phyir 
550.9(1): mi ldog pa'i 'bras bu dang / lan gcig phyir 'ong ba'i 'bras bu dang / rgyun du 
550.10(1): zhugs pa'i 'bras bu dang / tshad med pa bzhi la mkhas pa'i shes rab gsal bar 
550.11(1): gyur pa la/ 'khrul pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /g.yung 
550.12(1): drung gi bon phye ba med pa las ma 'dres pa dgu dang / yang dag pa'i rig pa nyid 
550.13(1): dang / g.yung drung gi yan lag dgu dang / gshen rab kyi bden pa bzhi dang /
550.14(1): so so yang dag par rig pa bzhi dang / mi bsnyel ba'i gzungs dang / mthar gyis 
550.15(1): gnas pa'i snyoms par 'jug pa dgu dang / mtshan ma med pa la snyoms par 'jug 
550.16(1): pa bzhi dang / rgyun du gnas pa'i thugs rje bzhi la mkhas pa'i shes rab gsal bar 
550.17(1): gyur pa la/ 'khrul pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /rtogs pa 
550.18(1): chen po'i lta ba dang / bsrung du med pa'i dam tshig dang / lhun gyis grub pa'i phrin 
550.19(1): las dang / rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa dang / legs par 'byung ba'i yon tan 
550.20(1): dang / snyoms par gnas pa'i ngang nyid dang / 'gyur ba med pa'i sku dang / rang 
550.21(1): bzhin med pa'i gsung dang / mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i thugs dang / rnam pa 
551.1(1): thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes dang / bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 'bras 
551.2(1): bu la mkhas pa'i shes rab gsal bar gyur pa la/ 'khrul pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams 
551.3(1): ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /ma 'dres pa'i yan lag phyag rgya/
551.4(1): gshen rab mi bos bka' stsal pa/ yid kyi khye'u chung g.yung drung sems dpa' 
551.5(1): sems dpa' chen po mkhas pa'i blo sbyong ba la/ skyo ngas byas na ngo mtshar chung ngo /
551.6(1): gang zhig rig pa rtsal sbyong pa la/ skyo ngas byed na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig rig 
551.7(1): pa rtsal sbyong pa la sgrib pa yod na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig dbang dang ldan pa 
551.8(1): la rloms sems bskyed na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig rmad du byung pa la che bcos 
551.9(1): byed na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig sbyin pa gtong pa la dmigs pa 'chal na ngo 
551.10(1): mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig tshul khrims bsrung pa la nyams shing 'chal na ngo mtshar 
551.11(1): chung ngo / gang zhig bzod pa bsgom pa'i skyes bu rnams ni byung tshor byung na ngo mtshar 
551.12(1): chung ngo / /gang zhig brtson 'grus bskyed pa'i skyes bu rnams ni btang snyoms byed 
551.13(1): na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig bsam gtan la gnas pa'i skyes bu rnams ni g.yo 
551.14(1): rtsol byed na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig stobs dang ldan pa'i skyes bu rnams ni 
551.15(1): gzhan la rnam par 'tshe na ngo mtshar chung ngo / gang zhig snying rje bskyed pa'i skyes bu 
551.16(1): rnams ni/ bdag phyogs byed na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig smon lam 'debs 
551.17(1): pa'i skyes bu rnams ni re dogs 'chal na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig thabs la 
551.18(1): mkhas pa'i skyes bu rnams ni g.yo sgyu byas na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /gang zhig shes 
551.19(1): rab gsal ba'i skyes bu rnams ni 'khrul pa byed na ngo mtshar chung ngo / /de'i phyir na/
551.20(1): g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po rnams/ gang zhig shes rab gsal 
551.21(1): ba la 'khrul pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /shes rab chen po 
552.1(1): la bcad pas ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig thabs la mkhas pa'i skyes bu rnams ni 
552.2(1): thabs la mkhas pa chen po la bcad pas e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig smon lam 
552.3(1): 'debs pa la re dogs med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni smon lam chen po la bcad pas 
552.4(1): e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig snying rje chen po la bdag phyogs med pa'i skyes bu 
552.5(1): rnams ni snying rje chen po la bcad pas e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig stobs dang 
552.6(1): ldan pa la rnam par 'tshe ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni/ stobs dang ldan pa chen po 
552.7(1): la bcad pas e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig bsam gtan la gnas pa la g.yo 
552.8(1): sgyu med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni bsam gtan chen po la bcad pas e ma ngo mtshar 
552.9(1): che'o/ /gang zhig brtson 'grus bskyed pa la btang snyoms med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni 
552.10(1): brtson 'grus chen po la bcad pas e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig bzod pa bsgom 
552.11(1): pa la byung tshor med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni bzod pa chen po la bcad pas e ma ngo 
552.12(1): mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig tshul khrims bsrung ba la 'chal ba med pa'i skyes bu rnams 
552.13(1): ni tshul khrims bsrung ba chen po la bcad pas e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig sbyin 
552.14(1): pa gtong ba la dmigs pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni/ sbyin pa chen po la bcad 
552.15(1): pas ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig rmad du byung ba la che bcos med pa'i skyes bu rnams 
552.16(1): ni rmad du byung ba la bcad pas e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig dbang dang ldan 
552.17(1): pa la rlom sems med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni dbang dang ldan pa la bcad pas e ma 
552.18(1): ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig rig pa gsal la sgrib pa med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni rig 
552.19(1): pa gsal ba chen po la bcad pas e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /gang zhig mkhas par blo 
552.20(1): sbyong pa la skyo ngas med pa'i skyes bu rnams ni mkhas par 'byams chen sa la bcad 
552.21(1): pas e ma ngo mtshar che'o/ /yid kyi khye'u chung de ni/ rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i 
553.1(1): ngo mtshar che'o/ /khams brgyad gtan la phab pa/ stong phrag nyi shu lnga pa/ skyes bu ngo 
553.2(1): mtshar gyi le'u ste lnga bcu pa'o// //ma 'dres pa'i yan lag phyag rgya/
553.3(1): 7 gshen rab mi bos bka' stsal pa/ yid kyi khye'u chung / bon thams cad mi 
553.4(1): g.yo ba la mnyam par bzhag pa'i phyir/ ting nge 'dzin zab mo'i bon 'di la mi 
553.5(1): dmigs pa'i snyoms par 'jug ste gnas pa de ni/ shin tu rig par bya'o/ /yid kyi 
553.6(1): khye'u chung de ni gang zhe na/ bon thams cad mi g.yo ba la mnyam par bzhag pa'i phyir/
553.7(1): ting nge 'dzin zab mo 'di la mi dmigs pa'i tshul gyis snyoms par 'jug ste gnas 
553.8(1): pa de ni shin tu rig par bya'o/ / /de bzhin du/ cir yang mi dmigs pa'i ting nge 
553.9(1): 'dzin dang / rgyu cir yang med pa cir yang ma yin pa'i ting nge 'dzin dang / rkyen

553.18(1): nge 'dzin dang / de kho na nyid kyi don la ma bcos pa la ci yang ma yin pa'i ting nge 
553.19(1): 'dzin dang / ting nge 'dzin de la mi dmigs pa'i tshul gyis snyoms par 'jug ste 
553.20(1): gnas par bya ba de ni shin tu rig par bya'o/ /mtshon cing brjod du med pa mi g.yo 
553.21(1): ba don gyi ting nge 'dzin dang / thog ma dang tha ma med pa don gyi ting nge 'dzin dang /

554.4(1): med pa don gyi ting nge 'dzin dang / de bzhin nyid yengs pa med pa'i don gyi ting

554.7(1): dang / de bzhin nyid bde ba chen po don gyi ting nge 'dzin dang / de bzhin nyid 
554.8(1): gsal la ma 'gag pa don gyi ting nge 'dzin dang / de bzhin nyid dpyad du med pa 
554.9(1): don gyi ting nge 'dzin dang / de bzhin nyid gsal la ma chags pa ma yengs pa don 
554.10(1): gyi ting nge 'dzin dang / de bzhin nyid mi bsnyel ba don gyi ting nge 'dzin ces bya ba 
554.11(1): yod do/ /de bzhin nyid ting nge 'dzin de la mi dmigs pa'i tshul gyis snyoms par 
554.12(1): 'jug ste gnas pa de ni shin tu rig par bya'o/ /kun tu snang ba'i ting nge 'dzin

555.21(1): 'dzin de la mi dmigs pa'i tshul gyis snyoms par 'jug ste gnas pa de ni shin tu

624.18(1): gsos su khyab pa dang / yangs pa'i rgyal khams kun du nad mug 'khrug rtsod dang rang 
624.19(1): byung 'byung ba'i 'jigs pa rnams rmeng med du zhi nas bde legs phun tshogs skyid kyi nyi
